emails.subject: Tetco M2
emails.body: Chris, I'm looking for gas delivered to two Tetco M2 interconnects with TCo. At the minimum, I'm looking for an offer for a flat baseload volume for December flow. My preference is to get an offer for a flat baseload volume from December through March. The points and volumes are: Delmont {Volume: 3,712/day} Windrifge {Volume: 2,859/day} Can I get a nymex plus offer? Thanks. mhg
